narrative:
Decatur Twp. township has 417 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
